title: Career Opportunity Teacher at BSC Academy

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at BSC Academy
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!
